summary: Phase 8 Live Polymarket Execution Adapter - All tests passed. Backend: 25/25 tests (100%). Frontend: 16/16 UI tests (100%). Live mode correctly blocked without credentials, shadow mode works, paper mode continues to function.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/execution/mode has mode, live_adapter_authenticated, credentials, live_enabled, safe_to_switch_live fields
GET /api/execution/mode credentials shows all 5 env vars as false (POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY, POLYMARKET_FUNDER_ADDRESS, POLYMARKET_API_KEY, POLYMARKET_API_SECRET, POLYMARKET_PASSPHRASE)
GET /api/execution/status has mode, paper_adapter, live_adapter, risk_config fields
GET /api/execution/status live_adapter.authenticated is false without credentials
POST /api/execution/mode mode=live returns 400 error (POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY not set)
POST /api/execution/mode mode=shadow returns 200 (allowed without live creds)
Engine start works in paper mode
Inject arb opportunity works in paper mode
frontend_ui_tests: Execution Mode section present with title 'Execution Mode' (renamed from 'Trading Mode')
Live Adapter badge with data-testid='live-adapter-badge' shows 'No Credentials'
Clicking LIVE button shows error (400 - no credentials)
Clicking SHADOW button switches mode successfully with toast
Clicking PAPER button switches back to paper mode
Trade Ticker present on Overview page
P&L Chart section present on Overview page
Persistence badge shows 'Saved [timestamp]' on Settings page
Shadow mode shows warning 'Polymarket credentials required for shadow mode'
regression_tests: All 7 nav items present in sidebar

seed_data_creation: None - tested existing API flows without creating persistent test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 Live Execution Adapter complete. LiveAdapter at /app/backend/engine/live_adapter.py wraps py-clob-client (v0.34.6) for Polymarket CLOB trading. Supports paper/shadow/live execution modes. NEW ENDPOINTS: GET /api/execution/mode (returns mode, credentials status, live_adapter_authenticated, safe_to_switch_live), GET /api/execution/status (detailed adapter status), POST /api/execution/mode (switches mode with safety checks). Without POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY, live mode is blocked with 400 error. Shadow mode allowed without credentials (logs what live would do, executes paper). Conservative LIVE_DEFAULTS enforced when switching to live: max_order_size=2, max_position_size=5, max_exposure=20, max_positions=3, max_daily_loss=10. Kill switch check included in live mode switch. Frontend Settings page renamed 'Trading Mode' to 'Execution Mode', added 'Credentials & Adapters' section showing Paper/Live adapter status. live-adapter-badge data-testid shows 'No Credentials' when not configured. All regression tests pass.
